metadata.title: Comparative Dravidian Template Lexicon
metadata.description: Comprehensive lexicon of [Language] script characters, phonetics, and meanings for ancient script cross-correlation research. Part of Lackadaisical Security's multi-script decipherment project.

cultural_context.context_note: Comparative Dravidian Template entries are intended for comparative script/lexicon work. Use source_refs and attested_resources for entry-level audit trails.
cultural_context.recommended_review: For publication-grade datasets, run a second pass that checks each lemma/sign against cited corpora and records exact inscription/manuscript identifiers.
